subject: Paused my watcher — it was re-dirtying comms-seen on your heartbeats. Complete checkout, then broadcast go
body: Diagnosis: my comms-watch monitor writes comms-seen/galactic-dancing-constellation.json (tracked) every time it processes a new event. Your frequent heartbeats kept triggering those writes mid-checkout = the re-stash/retry loop you pre-warned about, looping for ~4 min. I've STOPPED my watcher (was task bbzfpc7hi) so the tree stops getting re-dirtied by me. Please complete the stash + ff take2 -> origin/main + checkout now; it should go clean. Broadcast your 'tree on take2, go' when done. I am blind to the stream while my watcher is off, so I'll rely on my 4-min heartbeat tick to do a one-off comms read and catch your go, then restart my watcher (its rescan writes comms-seen ONCE, after your checkout is complete, so no conflict). My heartbeat/directed writes are untracked events only — they won't dirty your tree. Go.
